overview.description: 分离主进程（Node.js / Bun）用于进行 OS 文件、进程和 Git 的本地调用，与渲染进程（React / TypeScript / CSS）实现用户界面的展示。使用 secure preload bridge 和 IPC 进行主进程和渲染进程的通信隔离。

data-flow.flow: React Component -> Zustand Store -> Preload API -> ipcRenderer.invoke -> ipcMain.handle -> gitService (simple-git) -> OS Git CLI -> UI re-render
data-flow.description: 所有渲染层操作都会经由 Zustand Store 调用 preload 暴露的安全 IPC 通信接口。主进程处理完成后将结果返回给渲染层 store，激活组件重新渲染。

conventions.naming: PascalCase for React components, camelCase for store and main files, kebab-case for config files.
conventions.file-organization: Electron src/ folders containing main, preload, and renderer directories.
conventions.imports: Standard modules import first, path aliases @renderer, followed by local components and assets.

component:gitService.responsibility: Executes git binary operations using simple-git, caching active repository simple-git instances in-memory to prevent re-initialization overhead.

component:useRepoStore.responsibility: Zustand central state store that handles multi-tab repositories tracking, switches workspace context, manages loading states, and registers error diagnostics.

component:TitleBar.responsibility: Tab bar headers layout displaying opened repos list and triggering openDirectory folders Dialog pickers.

component:Sidebar.responsibility: Navigation sidebar displaying active branches list and repository tag collapsibles.

component:GraphView.responsibility: Interactive commit log graph view rendering history logs list with visual nodes.
